title: Lodestone Waypoints
description: A simple waypoints datapack using lodestones and the player indicator bar.
body:
**This datapack requires the "Player Locator Bar" experiment.**

A simple datapack to create waypoints using the player locator bar. Use a compass on a lodestone to create a waypoint, and its colour can be changed by placing a wool block on top of it. Breaking the lodestone block removed the waypoint.
